update_note: Terms revised for form-driven shape per ADR-006. Canvas-related terms marked legacy.

terms.definition: Main interaction surface: textarea + scenario cards + flags + action button + result panel.
Local source-backed rule layer consumed by the React UI.
Output of the rule engine: recommended command, chain, rationale, confidence, clarifying questions.
Browser-persisted route record with recommendation evidence and version metadata.
Route record published to a standalone URL with optional gallery visibility.
(legacy, voided by ADR-006) Former main interaction surface. Retained only for future read-only visualization pages.
(legacy, voided by ADR-006) Former ranked command candidates on a node. Replaced by RecommendationResult.
(legacy, voided by ADR-006) Former user-authored explanation on a connection between command nodes. Replaced by inline rationale in result panel.
